primary_claim: CLAF++ + Symbolic improves AUROC by 3.16 percentage points over AE only and reduces false alarm rate by 4.51 points.
meta_claim: The meta-learner improves AUROC by -0.14 percentage points over soft ensemble fusion, showing that learned stacking is the primary contributor.
symbolic_claim: The symbolic enhancement changes AUROC by 0.21 points and false alarm rate by -0.94 points relative to the neural meta model.
